objective_chain.description: Establish the initial path to the backing data store through exposed services.
Recover and submit the production flag.

hints: Begin from the internet-facing helpdesk service.
One exposed application path reaches data it should never return to unauthenticated users.
A simple injection path is sufficient once you identify the right request surface.
